used_questions: Which country has the lowest population density in the world, with only about 2 people per square kilometer?
Which country is the only nation in the world that is simultaneously located in all four hemispheres (Northern, Southern, Eastern, and Western)?
Which country is home to the lowest point on Earth's land surface, located at the shores of the Dead Sea?

past_trivia.question: Which country is home to the lowest point on Earth's land surface, located at the shores of the Dead Sea?
past_trivia.fun_fact: The Dead Sea shore sits at approximately 430 meters below sea level. Its hypersaline water allows people to float effortlessly.
